title: betonica officinalis subsp. alpigena
intro: Betonica officinalis subsp. alpigena, also known as Mountain Betony, is a subspecies of the Betonica officinalis plant, which belongs to the Lamiaceae family of flowering plants. This perennial herb is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Mountain Betony include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate headaches and migraines, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. Mountain Betony can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
